# GenAI & AIML Services Delivering intelligent solutions using Generative AI and Machine Learning to automate tasks, enhance decision-making, and drive innovation.
![](https://www.mksvision.com/images/ai-automation.webp)
## AI-Powered Automation & Workflow Optimization
Streamline business processes by integrating AI-driven automation for repetitive and complex tasks
![](https://www.mksvision.com/images/NLP.png)
## NLP and NLU Model Development for information extraction
Extract insights, summarize text, perform entity recognition, and automate language understanding tasks.
![](https://www.mksvision.com/images/chatbot.webp)
## Chatbot Development
Design and deploy intelligent conversational agents that provide personalized, real-time customer support and automate interactions.
![](https://www.mksvision.com/images/predictive.webp)
## Predictive Analytics & Forecasting
Use machine learning models to predict trends, customer behavior , and operational outcomes for proactive decision-making.
![](https://www.mksvision.com/images/text-image-video.webp)
## Text, Image & Video Analysis
Automate extraction, classification, and analysis of data from unstructured documents and multimedia documents using computer vision, NLP and Transformer models
![](https://www.mksvision.com/images/anomaly-detection.webp)
## Anomaly Detection
Identify unusual patterns or outliers in data to detect fraud, defects, or system failures early.
![](https://www.mksvision.com/images/RAG.png)
## Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
Enhance large language models by dynamically retrieving relevant external documents to generate accurate, context-aware responses.
![](https://www.mksvision.com/images/recommendation.webp)
## Recommendation Systems
Personalize user experiences by suggesting products, content, or services based on behavior and preferences.
![](https://www.mksvision.com/images/industry.png)
## Industry-Specific Model Development
Build custom AI models tailored to your business needs using machine learning, NLP, and computer vision for improved efficiency and innovation.
![](https://www.mksvision.com/images/ai-driven.webp)
## AI Driven Platform Migration
Migrating legacy tech stacks to modern frameworks using AI and LLM

# Engineering Services
### DESIGN
Bring your designs to life with high quality 3D models.
### BUILD
Prototype, test and certify your products for your target market.
### EMPOWER
Reach your goals faster with MKS Vision’s local support and global talent.
[Read More](https://www.mksvision.com/3d-scanning)
# Engineering Services
Supported Managed Engineering Services (SMES)
MKS Vision has over 50 years of combined experience in developing and managing global engineering talent to achieve design innovation, development, cost out, and quality goals. To address the shortfall in successfully integrating MES resources, MKS Vision pioneered the concept of Supported Managed Engineering Services (SMES), allowing companies to succeed in accessing global engineering talent for cost, flexibility and scalability.
## Maker to Market Services
Enable businesses the capability to penetrate global markets with engineering, maker to market services, global talent and flexible.
MKS Vision will assist you in adopting global services. If your business chooses, MKS Vision will also provide coaching along your journey to self-sustaining global resource management. We call this (SMES) Supported Managed Engineering Services. This is our process to bring this function internal to your business, so you have more influence over the management of your global resources.
![](https://www.mksvision.com/images/light.png)
## Design
 * Concept

## Product Certification

![](https://www.mksvision.com/images/supply_chain.png)
## Supply Chain
 * Quality
 * Management
 * Product Launch
 * PPAP
 * Life circle Services

## Strategic Sourcing......Reactive to proactive
We create value within purchasing processes by focusing on optimizing spend within categories and creating & sustaining buyer-supplier relationships.
### Process
![](https://www.mksvision.com/images/process1.png)
Profile the Category & Analyze Spend
![](https://www.mksvision.com/images/process2.png)
Analyze Supply Market
![](https://www.mksvision.com/images/process3.png)
Develop Procurement Strategy
![](https://www.mksvision.com/images/process4.png)
Request for Proposal / Quote
![](https://www.mksvision.com/images/process5.png)
Negotiate & Select Suppliers
![](https://www.mksvision.com/images/process6.png)
Implement & Integrate
![](https://www.mksvision.com/images/process7.png)
Benchmark & Track
### Benefits
 * Reduce costs (5-20%).
 * Improve procurement processes.
 * Improve supplier performance (cost, quality, delivery).
 * Develop supplier relationships & leverage Innovation.
 * Identify & minimize risks up front.

![](https://www.mksvision.com/images/savings.png)
## Our Success Stories
![Predictive Engineering](https://www.mksvision.com/images/PredictiveEngineering.png)
## Predictive Engineering - CFD
Developed multiple thermal models to overcome complex product performance enhancements of an evaporative cooling system for a large HVAC customer using computational fluid dynamics (CFD) study. The analysis helped the customer to find the optimal design to handle the static pressure drop and overall CFM of the system, reduced iterations on the prototype and testing thus improving overall of cost and timeline of their NPI cycle.
## Design Automation
Reduced 90% of order processing time for the application and engineering teams of a large conglomerate, integrating their CAD systems and processes by developing software application programming and adopting Top-down methodology for their customized product request. This resulted in automating multiple products and configurations under single application thus improving their overall cycle time.
![Design Automation](https://www.mksvision.com/images/img2.jpg)
![CAD Customization](https://www.mksvision.com/images/img3.jpg)
## CAD Customization
Reduced 95% manual efforts of creating CAD models and drawings by developing customized CAD applications that enables customers to convert existing databases (models and drawings) across different MOC's (Materials of construction) seamlessly thus reducing the manual efforts, maintaining the design intents, quality, improving the cycle time for the engineering teams.
## NPI Launch
Driven complete product development for an NPI launch starting from conceptualization, design analysis using our CAE capabilities, detailed engineering through product engineering framework using 9-step process, design to manufacture (DFM), design for assembly (DFA), product validation by developing prototypes & testing at our offshore facility. Thus, enabling the remote engineering a great success story for our customer NPI product launches.
![NPI Launch](https://www.mksvision.com/images/npi-launch1.jpg)
![Value Engineering](https://www.mksvision.com/images/value-engineering2.jpg)
## Value Engineering
Reduced product cost by carrying out value engineering projects for a large US home furniture manufacturing customer. Our cost out solution followed the VAVE (value Analysis and value engineering) methodology focusing on optimization of the key product features like weight, material, manufacturing/assembly processes without impacting the performance of the product.

Engineering Services

DESIGN

Bring your designs to life with high quality 3D models.

BUILD

EMPOWER

Reach your goals faster with MKS Vision’s local support and global talent.

Engineering Services

Supported Managed Engineering Services (SMES)

 

MKS Vision has over 50 years of combined experience in developing and managing global engineering talent to achieve design innovation, development, cost out, and quality goals. To address the shortfall in successfully integrating MES resources, MKS Vision pioneered the concept of Supported Managed Engineering Services (SMES), allowing companies to succeed in accessing global engineering talent for cost, flexibility and scalability.

Maker to Market Services

Enable businesses the capability to penetrate global markets with engineering, maker to market services, global talent and flexible.

MKS Vision will assist you in adopting global services. If your business chooses, MKS Vision will also provide coaching along your journey to self-sustaining global resource management. We call this (SMES) Supported Managed Engineering Services. This is our process to bring this function internal to your business, so you have more influence over the management of your global resources.

Strategic Sourcing……Reactive to proactive

We create value within purchasing processes by focusing on optimizing spend within categories and creating & sustaining buyer-supplier relationships.

Process

Profile the Category & Analyze Spend

Analyze Supply Market

Develop Procurement Strategy

Request for Proposal / Quote

Negotiate & Select Suppliers

Implement & Integrate

Benchmark & Track

Benefits

  • Reduce costs (5-20%).
  • Improve procurement processes.
  • Improve supplier performance (cost, quality, delivery).
  • Develop supplier relationships & leverage Innovation.
  • Identify & minimize risks up front.

Our Success Stories

 

Predictive Engineering - CFD

Developed multiple thermal models to overcome complex product performance enhancements of an evaporative cooling system for a large HVAC customer using computational fluid dynamics (CFD) study. The analysis helped the customer to find the optimal design to handle the static pressure drop and overall CFM of the system, reduced iterations on the prototype and testing thus improving overall of cost and timeline of their NPI cycle.

Design Automation

Reduced 90% of order processing time for the application and engineering teams of a large conglomerate, integrating their CAD systems and processes by developing software application programming and adopting Top-down methodology for their customized product request. This resulted in automating multiple products and configurations under single application thus improving their overall cycle time.

CAD Customization

Reduced 95% manual efforts of creating CAD models and drawings by developing customized CAD applications that enables customers to convert existing databases (models and drawings) across different MOC's (Materials of construction) seamlessly thus reducing the manual efforts, maintaining the design intents, quality, improving the cycle time for the engineering teams.

NPI Launch

Driven complete product development for an NPI launch starting from conceptualization, design analysis using our CAE capabilities, detailed engineering through product engineering framework using 9-step process, design to manufacture (DFM), design for assembly (DFA), product validation by developing prototypes & testing at our offshore facility. Thus, enabling the remote engineering a great success story for our customer NPI product launches.

Value Engineering

Reduced product cost by carrying out value engineering projects for a large US home furniture manufacturing customer. Our cost out solution followed the VAVE (value Analysis and value engineering) methodology focusing on optimization of the key product features like weight, material, manufacturing/assembly processes without impacting the performance of the product.

## Prototyping
Prototyping capabilities are constantly evolving. We have relationships with prototyping facilities that can provide:
 * 3D Printing (wide array of plastics and metals)
 * CNC Router, Laser cut, Water jet
 * CNC Milling
 * Soft tooling
 * Metal forming
 * Machining

## Labs
MKS Vision has established relationships with regulatory agencies around the globe to get your products certified.
We also provide expertise in finishes and coatings. We will work with you to develop or certify your coatings and applications.
![](https://www.mksvision.com/images/las.jpg)
![](https://www.mksvision.com/images/VisionScan3D.png)
## 3D Scanning & Metrology
Vision Scan 3D is a subsidiary of MKS Vision, focusing on 3D non-contact structured light scanning. Click the image to visit www.VisionScan3D.com
Vision Scan 3D offers digitization, metrology, reverse engineering and many other capabilities in the 3D scanning and optical metrology space.
## Product Certification
MKS Vision has a history of successful product certification projects with global agencies like UL, NSF, CSA and many others.
